unique_value.note: Strong calculator tools. Thin blog content (125 guides). Placeholder content on /data. -10 for thin footprint.

content_depth.note: Mortgage calculator is excellent template. Other 7 money calculators unchecked. /data is thin. -5 for inconsistent depth.

trust_transparency.note: Good trust pages exist but: missing Methodology from footer, no AI disclosure, 'no ads' contradiction, unprovable homepage claims. -8 for trust gaps.

navigation_ux.note: Clean design but Sign In/Get Started in primary nav signals SaaS over content. AI Specialist thin for public. -6 for nav issues.

policy_compliance.note: Privacy, Terms, Cookies, Disclaimer all present and mostly correct. Privacy needs ad partner update. -3 for missing ad disclosures.

technical_quality.note: TypeScript clean. Responsive design. No broken nav links. Minor count inconsistencies. -2 for polish.

monetization_safety.note: No AdSense code deployed yet. Adsterra is global but AdSense review focuses on Google ad policies. Safe for now.

critical_issues_list: Homepage: 4 unprovable trust claims (Used by thousands, AI Overviews, 4.9★, No ads)
/data: 'Coming soon' and 'Planned Data Sections' visible on indexable page
Footer: Methodology page not linked in navigation
About: 'No ads' language contradicts active Adsterra
Homepage: Calculator count inconsistent (124 vs 125 vs 125+)
Header nav: Sign In/Get Started signal SaaS, not content site
note: Even with all fixes, may not reach 90 without addressing thin blog content and auditing remaining calculators. Projected 85 is borderline.
